## Public contribution checklist

- [ ] This change belongs to the public APIForge Core scope defined in `docs/public/OPEN_CORE_SCOPE.md`.
- [ ] This change contains no credentials, tokens, private endpoints, environment values, deployment details, or signing materials.
- [ ] This change contains no internal product roadmap, audit, Project Control, prompt, licensing, billing, authentication, entitlement, or infrastructure documentation.
- [ ] Any added code imports only dependencies approved for public MIT distribution.
- [ ] Any user-facing functionality described here is actually delivered by the public Core source tree.

## Summary

Describe the public Core change and the verification performed.

## Validation

List public build, test, documentation, or review checks performed.
